curiosityQuestion: Have you ever wondered how Event Bubbling works under the hood in JavaScript?
whyExists: Event Bubbling is a core building block in JavaScript. It solves fundamental structural and data manipulation problems that arise when building scalable applications.
realWorldAnalogy: Think of Event Bubbling like a well-designed component in an everyday physical system — organizing, transforming, and routing data efficiently.
simpleExplanation: At its foundation, Event Bubbling provides a clear, standardized way to execute logic in JavaScript. This section explains every detail step by step from absolute zero.
